items.scenario: You ordered a pair of running shoes online for a race next week, but the box that arrived contained two left shoes in different sizes. You need a correct pair before the event.
items.direction: Write an email to the store's customer support. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the problem with the shoes you received
Ask how a corrected order can reach you before the race
Explain why a quick replacement matters to you
items.subject: Mismatched shoes in my recent order

items.scenario: You volunteer at a neighborhood community garden, and the new watering schedule posted last Monday assigns everyone to early mornings. Many members are at work then, so several plots are going unwatered through the hot afternoons.
items.direction: Write an email to the garden coordinator. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain the problem with the current watering schedule
Suggest a way to cover the afternoon shifts
Ask who decides the final timetable
items.subject: Watering shifts for the community garden

items.scenario: You moved into a furnished apartment last month, and the heating system has now stopped working just as outdoor temperatures drop. You already reported the problem once by phone last week but received no response.
items.direction: Write an email to your landlord. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the heating problem and the earlier report
Request a repair within the next few days
Ask what to do if a technician cannot come soon
items.subject: Heating still not working in my apartment

items.scenario: You signed up for a weekend photography workshop, and the confirmation lists a location far from the one advertised online. You want to attend but need to confirm the correct details before paying.
items.direction: Write an email to the workshop organizer. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain the difference between the two locations
Ask which address and time are correct
Request confirmation before your payment is processed
items.subject: Location mix-up for the photography workshop
